---
title: "ParlGov Visualizations"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 8 
    fig_height: 5
    theme: cosmo
---

</br>
In the following, the possibilities of data analysis on the basis of the ParlGov database are explained by the use of several visualizations.

The main dataset is divided into three parts:

* ##### [**Parties**](party_vis.html)
* ##### [**Elections**](election_vis.html)
* ##### [**Cabinets**](cabinet_vis.html)

Each of the categories is analysed graphically by one case examples.
</br>

___

### References
Döring, Holger and Philip Manow (2019) Parliaments and governments database (ParlGov): Information on parties, elections and cabinets in modern democracies. Development version.

Laakso, M. & Taagepera, R. (1979) '"Effective" Number of Parties: A Measure with Application to West Europe', *Comparative Political Studies*, 12(1), pp. 3-27.
